parameters.query: SELECT s.supplier_name, s.edrpou, s.sanctions_status, s.risk_score_affiliation, s.screening_status FROM suppliers s WHERE s.risk_score_affiliation > 70 OR s.sanctions_status = 'flagged' LIMIT 100

SELECT pb.item_description, pb.supplier_name, pb.market_price_uah, pb.contract_price_uah, pb.price_deviation_pct, pb.review_status FROM price_benchmarks pb WHERE pb.price_deviation_pct > 20 AND pb.review_status = 'pending' LIMIT 100

SELECT g.recipient_organisation, g.grant_programme, g.amount_eur, g.gprc_status, g.iam_review_required, g.mfa_enforced, g.pqc_roadmap_submitted, g.crypto_inventory_done FROM grants_risk_dossiers g WHERE g.gprc_status != 'approved' LIMIT 100
